name: Synthetic Lethality Engine
what_it_solves: Given a PatientState, evaluates each of 8 CandidateAxis dependencies and returns tier-assigned, evidence-fused RankedIntervention list.
how_it_solves: Sub-modules: core/ (axis dispatch + tier logic), multimodal/ (7-modality fuser), kb/ (curated evidence loaded read-only), audit/ (AuditEntry per tier assignment), api/ (thin HTTP surface). Called from the Orchestrator at Phase 3.5.
why_it_exists: Every axis dependency previously had scattered, ad-hoc logic; the engine consolidates fusion + tiering + provenance in one testable module with strict boundaries.
